title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_April 3, 2025] 2025 National Natural Science Foundation of China and TÜBİTAK – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_April 3, 2025] 2025 National Natural Science Foundation of China and TÜBİTAK
National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) and The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TÜBİTAK) are calling for proposals for collaborative research projects.
You could visit their official website for more information: 2025国自然科学基金委员会与土耳其科学技术研究理事会合作研究项目指南
Budget Total:
The funds from the Chinese side is 800,000-1,000,000 RMB per project (direct costs), while the funding support from the Turkish side is 3,000,000 TRY per project.
The funding covers research expenses and international cooperation and exchange costs. During the project implementation, if exchange visits are required, expenses such as international travel, accommodation, and emergency medical insurance should be covered by the sending party.
What to fund:
肿瘤免疫治疗及临床转化（Cancer Immunotherapy and Clinical Translation Research），肿瘤大数据与人工智能（Big Data and Artificial Intelligence for Oncology）
磁共振成像和超声医学（Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) and Ultrasonic Medicine），医学影像大数据与人工智能（Big Data and Artificial Intelligence for Medical Images）
绿色和可持续农业（Green and Sustainable Agriculture）
Please visit the official website for more information.
Project Period: The research duration in the application should be filled out from January 1, 2026, to December 31, 2028 (three years).
Eligibility:
The Chinese applicants should hold senior professional technical positions (titles) 高级专业技术职务（职称）and have undertaken or be currently undertaking NSFC projects with a duration of three years or more as the PI.
Both parties have established a strong foundation for collaboration, and the project application should emphasize synergy and complementary strengths.
More details, please refer to <2025 NSFC Guidelines>.
Quota Requirements:
An applicant can only apply for one international (regional) collaborative research project in the same year.
The PI who is currently undertaking an international (regional) collaborative research project cannot apply for this project as an applicant.
Applying for and undertaking this project as an applicant or PI is not counted towards the limit of 2 projects for personnel with senior professional technical positions (titles).
Other quota requirements listed in <2025 NSFC Guidelines>
Application Process:
Apply online through https://grants.nsfc.gov.cn. Detailed steps, please refer to: 2025国自然科学基金委员会与土耳其科学技术研究理事会合作研究项目指南
Prepare the budget. Please see <2025 NSFC Guidelines> for requirements for budgeting.
Prepare the application forms. More details, please refer to: 2025国自然科学基金委员会与土耳其科学技术研究理事会合作研究项目指南Applicants should co-write an English application with their collaborators (the English application template can be found in Attachment 1).Applicants from both China and Russia must reach an agreement on the research content, exchange and visit plans, and intellectual property issues, and sign a cooperation agreement (the template can be found here as Attachment 2).
Applicants should co-write an English application with their collaborators (the English application template can be found in Attachment 1).
Applicants from both China and Russia must reach an agreement on the research content, exchange and visit plans, and intellectual property issues, and sign a cooperation agreement (the template can be found here as Attachment 2).
Project applications that do not submit the above required attachments will not be accepted.
Project applications that do not submit the above required attachments will not be accepted.
Language: Chinese for PI from DKU to complete the proposal in the NSFC grants system, English for the English to be completed by PIs from both sides and submitted as a supplementary document along with the NSFC proposal.
Internal Deadline: 12:00 pm, Friday, May 23, 2025
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity, please submit your proposals via NSFC system by the internal deadline. Shall you encounter any difficulties or have any questions regarding the application process (including the requirements, completing forms, or clarifying any details), please feel free to reach out to Research Support Office Duke Kunshan research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn.See attachment 1
See attachment 2
